title: Did you reach an agreement with FoxIO-LLC to use Apache license?
author: biandratti
body:
Hi, I'm curious about JA4H use. Did you get a aggretment with FoxIO-LLC?
JA4H is not part of the open source license, how did you obtain the Apache license using JA4H? Thanks in advance!

title: Custom rules doesn't trigger when accessed through domain
author: shibayandesu
body: It's just like the title says, when you access the server through the IP:PORT, say 111.111.111.111:9443, the rule trigger (in this case the deny rule) but when you access it through DOMAIN:PORT, say example.com:9443, access is allowed by the proxy, i.e, it defaults to the allow rule in the default block.
